applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.clause_text: 同一发票最多报销1次。发现同一发票在不同报销单中重复出现的,应认定为重复报销风险。
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: Both R000020 (expense_date 2025-01-05) and R004203 (expense_date 2025-04-10) fall within the effective period of this policy.

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Repealed by Article 14 of the 2025 policy, effective 2025-01-01. Both audited records have expense dates after this repeal date. The 2022 document itself states it is for archival reference only and the current system should follow the 2025 revised version.

policy_relationships.citation: 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md, Article 14: 本办法自二〇二五年一月一日起施行。原《XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)》同时废止。
